description: ILNA is an Iranian news agency connected to the Workers' House (Khaneh Kargar), a reformist-leaning labour institution. Founded in 2003, it is notable for covering labour protests, workers' rights, and trade union issues — topics that most Iranian state media avoid or downplay. ILNA occupies a reformist position in the regime media spectrum and has periodically faced pressure from hardline factions.
editorial_notes: Connected to Workers' House (Khaneh Kargar). One of the few outlets covering labour issues.
